questionText: Report your organization's energy consumption totals (excluding feedstocks) for metals and mining production activities in MWh.
questionKo: 보고 귀사의 에너지 소비 총량 (제외 원료) 및 광업 생산 활동 MWh.
simpleHelp: Question 7.30.1 has been modified and represented here for the metals and mining sector. This is to enable consistency of reporting across organizations with varying coverage over activities that may be separate from the metals and mining sector or independent of the production activities defining the metals and mining sector. Metals and mining activities can also be particularly energy intensive, so it is important to represent the sector separately from outside activities.

rows.title: Consumption of purchased or acquired electricity
Consumption of purchased or acquired heat
Consumption of purchased or acquired steam
Consumption of purchased or acquired cooling
Consumption of self-generated non-fuel renewable energy

columns.text: MWh consumed from renewable sources inside metals and mining sector boundary
columns.textKo: MWh 소비한 에서 재생에너지 배출원 및 광업 섹터 경계

columns.text: MWh consumed from non-renewable sources inside metals and mining sector boundary
columns.textKo: MWh 소비한 에서 -재생에너지 배출원 및 광업 섹터 경계

columns.text: MWh consumed from non-renewable zero or near-zero emission sources inside metals and mining sector boundary
columns.textKo: MWh 소비한 에서 -재생에너지 제로 또는 -제로 배출 배출원 및 광업 섹터 경계

guidance.textKo: 전년 대비 변경사항은 2026 CDP 원문 및 변경 추적표 기준으로 확인하십시오.

guidance.text: This question appears if you selected "Yes" to any of the activities listed in 7.30. A row will appear in this table for each energy-related activity selected in 7.30. The "Total energy consumption" row will always appear.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
This question is based on question 7.30.1 but is sector specific. Energy consumed outside the metal and mining sector should not be reported here.
The boundary surrounding your organization in the metals and mining sector shall hereby be referred to as the organizational/sector boundary. The sector boundary for energy consumption should align with the sector boundary for emissions, which is described in the guidance for question 7.19.
Figures you provide should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4).
This table is for gross energy consumption data only. You should not provide net consumption nor deduct for energy produced or exported from the organizational/sector boundary. Because feedstock fuels are excluded from this question, this approach should not lead to double counting.
Guidance on unit conversion is available in the following Technical Note: " Conversion of fuel data to MWh ". 
Report all of your fuel data consistently using the same heating value as selected in 7.30.1.
"Total MWh" will be calculated using column "MWh consumed from renewable sources inside metals and mining sector boundary" and column "MWh consumed from non-renewable sources inside metals and mining sector boundary" only (not column "MWh consumed from non-renewable zero or near-zero emission sources inside metals and mining sector boundary"). 
Activity (column 0) 
You will be presented with a row for each activity selected in 7.30.
Consumption of fuel (excluding feedstocks) 
All fuel consumed for energy purposes inside the organizational/sector boundary should be included, regardless of whether the fuel was purchased or produced by the organization. Fuel consumed as a feedstock (used for the production of another fuel) should not be included. The produced fuel should still be included if it is consumed within the organizational boundary.
If you do not have exact consumption data, you may alternatively estimate your company's consumption by reviewing fuel and energy purchasing orders.
Consumption of self-generated non-fuel renewable energy 
If your organization produces renewable energy that is not based on fuel (such as solar, wind, hydro, geothermal, marine), then any consumption of this energy should be entered here.
Consumption of renewable fuels (such as solid and liquid biofuels and biogas) should be excluded because these are accounted for in the row "Consumption of fuel (excluding feedstock)".
All forms of non-fuel renewable energy - electricity, heat, steam, or cooling - shall be included.
Total energy consumption 
The data entered in this row should equal the sum of all the above rows (if the above rows have been fully disclosed for).
If you do not disclose data for specific energy carriers in the rows above, but you are able to enter the total energy consumed by your organization inside the metals and mining sector boundary, then you should do so.
MWh consumed from renewable sources inside metals and mining sector boundary (column 1) 
Waste energy should not be included if it is derived from fossil fuels. 
Hydrogen should not be included if it is derived from fossil fuels.
Blended fuels deriving from both renewable and non-renewable sources should be split by the proportion contained from each source. For municipal waste and refuse-derived fuel, only the fraction of the fuel that is derived from biomass can be included as renewable energy, when calculating renewable energy consumption totals. Further explanations of municipal waste and a glossary of fuel definitions is provided in the CDP Technical Note: " Fuel Definitions" .
MWh consumed from non-renewable sources inside metals and mining sector boundary (column 2) 
All energy not identified as deriving from renewable sources should be entered, e.g. coal, oil, natural gas, etc. 
In the "Consumption of purchased or acquired electricity" row, the figure reported in this column should be inclusive of the figure reported in column "MWh consumed from non-renewable zero or near-zero emission sources inside metals and mining sector boundary".
MWh consumed from non-renewable zero or near-zero emission sources inside metals and mining sector boundary (column 3) 
This figure should be a subset of the figure reported in column "MWh consumed from non-renewable sources inside metals and mining sector boundary".
Include electricity consumption from nuclear plants and fossil fuel plants fitted with carbon capture and storage which generate zero or near-zero emissions.
Do not include electricity consumption from fossil-fuel plants fitted with carbon capture and storage if the emissions associated with its generation are higher than near-zero.
Do not include natural gas, combined cycle gas turbine or fossil fuel-based combined heat and power (cogeneration). Although these sources are less carbon intensive than other means of electricity production like coal, they should not be reported in this column as they do not generate zero or near-zero emissions.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점 부여됨 당 완료 셀 비율 숫자 입력 의 셀 표시된. 이 문항에서 최대 6/6점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Table completed - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표 완료 - 1 점 이 문항에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다.

change.question_ko: 보고 조직의 에너지 소비량 (제외 원료) 금속 광업 생산 활동 MWh.
change.q2025_text: Report your organization's energy consumption totals (excluding feedstocks) for metals and mining production activities in MWh.
change.detail_change_types: New guidance, New column, Modified autocalculation
change.change_summary:
General guidance added that heating value should be consistent with heating value reported in 7.30.1. Additional guidance added to clarify the calculation of the Total column.
New column
New column - does not appear for row 'Consumption of self-generated non-fuel renewable energy'.
New column - appears only for electricity and total rows.
Autocalculation added
change.daml_summary: Metals & mining: D 6/6 | A 1/1 | M 0/0 | L 0/0

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '보고 귀사의 에너지 소비 총량 (제외 원료) 및 광업 생산 활동 MWh.'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
